docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $660.00 FILED BY SCHULZ, DOMINIK AS TO DEFENDANT DROBEY, REJANE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EVIDENCE RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCHULZ, DOMINIK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DROBEY, REJANE $375.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $421.00, DEFENDANT EVIDENCED SOME REPAIRS, BUT SAID EVIDENCE WAS NOT DETAILED ENOUGH TO SUPPORT A COMPLETE DEFENSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-16-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DROBEY, REJANE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY SCHULZ, DOMINIK DROBEY, REJANE
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCHULZ, DOMINIK AS TO DEFENDANT DROBEY, REJANE
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SCHULZ, DOMINIK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2009 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES PAID BY DEFENDANT DROBEY, REJANE
RECEIVED COPY OF JUDGMENT WITH COPY OF CHECK PAYABLE TO DOMINIC SCHULZ IN THE AMOUNT OF $421.00.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-02-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
